traffic.title: Comprehensive Study of Traffic Congestion at Hebbal Flyover
traffic.summary: Academic study analyzing traffic flow and bottlenecks, noting that the convergence of multiple lanes into the flyover creates significant congestion, requiring geometric improvements.

traffic.title: New Hebbal flyover loop expected to reduce congestion by 30%
traffic.summary: Recent additions, including a 700-meter loop inaugurated to connect Nagawara to Mehkri Circle, were designed to reduce congestion by approximately 30%.

vendor.title: Predatory Infrastructure: The displacement of Bengaluru street vendors
vendor.summary: Urban researchers characterize long-duration construction projects as predatory, often forcing small businesses and street vendors to shut down or relocate, causing permanent livelihood loss.

aqi.title: Air Quality Impact of Infrastructure Decongestion
aqi.summary: Studies indicate that while surface-level improvements increase average vehicle speeds (from ~20 to 40 km/h), the reduction in idling time directly correlates with lower localized PM2.5 emissions.

traffic.title: Bengaluru Tunnel Road Project: Traffic Impact Analysis
traffic.summary: Independent reviews suggest the proposed Hebbal to Silk Board tunnel could create new traffic gridlocks at entry and exit points, potentially exacerbating surface-level congestion.

traffic.title: Evaluating Grade-Separated Underpass Solutions
traffic.summary: Underpass construction provides localized grade separation but shifts bottlenecks downstream. Short-term construction phase causes severe surface disruption taking 6+ months.

traffic.title: Bengaluru Adaptive Traffic Control System (B-ATCS) Performance
traffic.summary: AI-driven systems using real-time data to manage signals have achieved up to a 33% reduction in travel time at key junctions without requiring new road infrastructure.

aqi.title: Emission Reduction Co-Benefits of AI Traffic Signals
aqi.summary: Dynamic signal adjustments minimize vehicle idling and stop-and-go cycles, contributing to an estimated 10% reduction in vehicular emissions (CO, NOx, and PM) at optimized intersections.

traffic.title: Namma Metro Phase 2: Traffic Disruptions and Long-term Relief
traffic.summary: Prolonged construction periods and barricading lead to significant bottlenecks. Operational lines offer fast transit, but lack of last-mile connectivity limits overall reduction in private vehicles.
